title: Zalingei Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Zalingei with a Z-Score of +3.89. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Zalingei is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 12.6 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 21%, and the wind speed is approximately 6.0 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The lack of precipitation and high temperatures will continue to worsen the heat wave conditions.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures to mitigate the effects of the heat wave immediately.
